name: Pole Tenon Spoke Twin Bracket – 180° Arms for 2 Fixtures
description: Pole Tenon Spoke Twin Bracket – 180° Arms for 2 Fixtures from ZION LED USA. This heavy-duty twin bracket is designed to mount two fixtures at 180° on a single pole. It fits over a standard 2-3/8″ O.D. Tenon and supports fixtures with 2-3/8″ I.D. Slip fitters—ideal for LED street lights, shoebox lights, and flood lights.
short_desc: Features: 180° Dual Arms : Mounts two fixtures in opposite directions Easy Installation : Slips onto 2-3/8″ O.D. tenon or pole top Heavy-Duty Build : Durable aluminum construction with reinforced welds Universal Fit : Compatible with standard 2-3/8″ I.D. slip fitter fixtures Finish : Weather-resistant dark bronze finish Applications: LED street lighting Shoebox parking lot lighting Flood lights and outdoor area lighting
